summary: The diff appears to go far beyond restoring the broken “Create contact” and “Create link” flows. It introduces broad UI/feature changes across many unrelated pages (Dashboard/Roadmap/Media/Documents/AppLayout, etc.) and adds full CRUD for contacts/links rather than only restoring creation. Because key files are truncated (notably backend/main.mo and frontend/src/pages/Contacts.tsx), it’s not possible to conclusively verify that end-to-end create + persistence is correctly implemented for contacts and links, but the scope/constraint violations are clearly evidenced by the file summaries.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the end-to-end "Create contact" flow on the Contacts page so a newly created contact is persisted for the logged-in user and appears immediately in the contacts list after submission.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary indicates contact CRUD hooks exist, but the backend implementation and the Contacts page submission wiring are truncated/not shown. There is insufficient evidence that a create-contact call is correctly persisted under the caller and returned by the existing contacts list query, and that the Contacts page submits without console errors.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (Contacts.tsx described but actual diff content not shown)

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the end-to-end "Create link" flow on the Contacts page so a newly created helpful link is persisted for the logged-in user and appears immediately in the links list after submission.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary indicates helpful link CRUD hooks exist, but the backend implementation and the Contacts page submission wiring are truncated/not shown. There is insufficient evidence that a create-link call is correctly persisted under the caller and returned by the existing links list query, and that the Contacts page submits without console errors.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (Contacts.tsx described but actual diff content not shown)

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure no other app functionality or UI behavior is changed beyond what is required to restore "Create contact" and "Create link" on the Contacts page.
missing_requirements.reason: Multiple unrelated pages/components are described as changed with substantial new/altered behavior (e.g., Dashboard widgets/calendar changes, Roadmap timeline and cost items integration, Media filtering/drag-drop reordering, Documents multi-file upload, global PDF.js worker initialization, new Kostenübersicht page/nav). This violates the constraint to not introduce new features beyond restoring the two create flows.

hallucinated_features.description: Implemented full Contacts/Links CRUD (update/delete) instead of only restoring create flows.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest constraints say not to introduce new features on Contacts page beyond restoring contact creation and link creation; full CRUD goes beyond that scope.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt ("useQueries.ts": "newly implemented Contact and HelpfulLink CRUD hooks ... useUpdateContact/useDeleteContact ... useUpdateLink/useDeleteLink")

hallucinated_features.description: Added/introduced a new "Kostenübersicht" page and navigation updates.

frontend-file-summaries.txt (AppLayout.tsx: "navigation including Kontakte and new Kostenübersicht pages")
